name: HUBB Ventures, Inc.
summary: HUBB Ventures, Inc. provides integrated application solutions for the micro, small, and medium business and government markets in the small enterprise resource platform. It focuses on delivering of IP technology solutions and agriculture services to business, industry, and government by providing access to an array of technology solution for the small business and government agriculture markets in the areas of software as a service, investment and financing, business education, international trade, business and medical tourism, agriculture, and infrastructure as a service. The company is headquartered in Miami, Florida.
